name: Joseph Marioni: Artist’s Choice
description: The New York Studio School presents Joseph Marioni: Artist’s Choice, a works on paper retrospective curated by Karen Wilkin. It features over thirty works on paper that trace the evolution of a painter’s half-century engagement with color, surface, and perception.

name: UrbanSparkle 2025
description: This annual exhibition features jewelers specifically working in the medium of glass, including artists Deirdre Maine, Everett Hoffman, Julia Turner, and Nikki Couppee.

name: Winter by Empire
description: Experience seasonal festivities, decor, and unique activations at Empire Stores throughout the winter season.

name: Lobby Shops: Fluffy Algodón Cotton Candy
description: Visit this whimsical confectionery for handcrafted cotton candy creations featuring unique flavors and creative presentations.
short_name: Lobby Shops: Fluffy Algodón Cotton Candy

name: Tommy Kha: Leftovers
description: An exhibition by Tommy Kha.

name: “Anna Christie”
description: Michelle Williams stars in Eugene O’Neill’s classic play about a woman reconciling with her father on a coal barge. Directed by Thomas Kail, this production crackles with a mix of grit and star-powered elegance.

name: World Food Photography Awards
description: Powerful photos that capture vibrant street food culture from around the world and celebrate the people, flavors, and traditions that make it unique. Co-curated by the WFPA and (MOFAD) to complement Street Food City, MOFAD’s latest exhibition.
sublocation: 2nd floor of the Empire Stores building

name: Every Sunday Afternoon: Filled Pasta Making!
description: Traditionally Sunday is a day in Italian culture friends and family come together to cook, eat, and share quality time. Evento brings this mindset Sunday afternoons! These events are a perfect way to wind down your weekend. On Sundays we always teach really fun pastas such as Tortelli, Tortellini, Ravioli, Cappelletti, and more!

name: Concern for Quaker Living (CQL) Working Group Meeting
description: Concern for Quaker Living (CQL) helps our meetings to welcome and nurture a caring community of Friends in all stages of life, particularly the oldest Friends. This working group meeting focuses on community support and Quaker values.
short_name: Concern for Quaker Living Working Group Meeting

name: Friendly Co-working at Brooklyn Meeting
description: Join Friends and friends-of-Friends for co-working at Brooklyn Meeting. Drop by any time. We supply chairs, tables, power, tea, coffee, snacks, and wifi.

name: CB6 Full Board Meeting
description: This is a full board meeting for Brooklyn Community Board 6. Further details can be found by adding the event to your calendar.

name: Peer Support Group for Job Seekers
description: A mutually supportive space for job seekers to share experiences, encouragement, and practical strategies. This group helps members build resilience, confidence, and hope through shared journey.
short_name: Peer Support Group for Job Seekers

name: Bipoc Meetup
description: Join the BIPOC Climbing Collective for a night of bouldering, ropes, and fun at Gowanus. This event is for Black, Indigenous, People of Color to climb and build community.

name: The Phoenix
description: The Phoenix hosts sober climbing events for members and guests on the second Saturday of every month. The only requirement to attend is 48 hours of continuous sobriety. Friends and family are welcome.

name: Crux Queer Femme
description: Crux Queer Femme is a climbing event designed for individuals who identify as femme or have felt femme and want to climb. This event offers a welcoming space for all.

name: A Night in Roma!
description: Transport yourself to the Eternal City for an unforgettable Roman winter night. This immersive culinary experience features interactive stations where you’ll roll pasta, shake up Roman-inspired cocktails and eat lots of great food! The event also includes a live DJ, on-site sketch artist, and open bar.

name: Exploration: LIVE!
description: A live recording of the popular podcast Exploration: LIVE! featuring comedic discussions.

name: Radio
description: This exhibition by Hagen Eberle and Matthias Holznagel explores radio as a medium and artistic concept.

name: Sandra Bernhard: Caught Off Guard
description: Sandra Bernhard presents "Caught Off Guard," a show exploring the current times with her signature groove, beat, and style. Expect a unique blend of commentary, performance, and elevated conversation.

name: Holiday Pop-Up Bar
description: Visit this festive dog-friendly pop-up bar featuring over-the-top holiday cocktails, mocktails, and plenty of twinkle lights. The evening features joyful seasonal tunes and a laptop-free environment for you and your fur-friends.

name: Marty Supreme
description: Timothée Chalamet stars as a ping-pong ace who goes to hell and back in pursuit of greatness in this film by Josh Safdie.

name: The Secret Agent
description: This neo-noir masterpiece was the most awarded film at the 2025 Cannes Film Festival.

name: Family Bowl
description: A family-friendly holiday bowling session open to all ages with no cover charge.

name: Play at BCM
description: Come explore some of BCM's most-loved exhibits, including toddler-favorite Totally Tots and the miniature shops of World Brooklyn.

name: Brooklyn Navy Yard: Past, Present & Future
description: This permanent exhibition explores the Brooklyn Navy Yard's history from its 1801 founding to its modern role as an innovation hub. Visitors can view artifacts and historical narratives spread across three floors of a restored 1858 residence.

name: Friday Night Cooking Party Evento x Bucketlisters
description: A collaborative hands-on cooking social hosted by Evento and Bucketlisters. Enjoy an evening of Italian culinary techniques, drinks, and party vibes to kick off the weekend.
short_name: Friday Night Cooking Party Evento x Bucketlisters

description: A satirical R&B musical comedy telling the story of Barack Obama's presidency as Joe Biden "kinda sorta" remembers it. The show features Broadway-caliber singing and sophisticated satire.

name: Pen Pals
description: This play tells the story of two women who have been best friends for fifty years through letters, featuring Melissa Gilbert and Veanne Cox. Five percent of ticket sales are donated to Susan G. Komen for breast cancer research.

name: The Circle (Online Meditation & Prayer)
description: A quiet, contemplative session starting with centering prayer, followed by silence, devotional poetry, and a sharing of prayer requests.

name: A Jolly Holiday: Christmas Traditions from New Amsterdam
description: This exhibition explores how many modern holiday traditions, like Santa Claus and New Year’s calling, originated from New York's early Dutch founders. Visitors can view 19th-century gifts and holiday decorations displayed throughout the Tredwell home.

name: Friday Nights
description: Experience one of NYC's premier rooftop nightlife events featuring three floors of music and dancing. Guests can enjoy French dining and a dynamic atmosphere with optional bottle service.

name: Reggaeton Fridays @ The DL
description: Dance to the best Reggaeton beats at this multi-level club event. The night features high-energy Latin music across three floors with table reservations available.

name: The Stand Presents
description: A high-energy stand-up showcase featuring Stef Dag, Andre Kim, Tristan Bowling, and other top comedic talents.

name: DIY Tapestry Weaving for Beginners
description: Learn how to dress a loom and create small tapestry-style weavings that can be used as coasters or wall hangings. Each student receives a simple homemade loom to keep.

name: Brunch Italiano!
description: Spend a Saturday afternoon rolling rigatoni and cutting pasta sheets using the chitarra. This hands-on festa includes northern Italian bites, an open wine bar, and lively music.

name: Evento's Pizza Making Dance Party!
description: Learn to make Neapolitan style pizza from the Evento team before hitting the dance floor. The evening includes an open wine bar, fresh pasta, salad, dessert, and a live DJ.

name: Immigrant New York Food Tour
description: Explore the rich history of the Lower East Side through its diverse culinary landscape. This guided tour features stories of immigrant communities and the unique food cultures that shaped the neighborhood.

name: Dancehall Forever
description: A party for Dancehall lovers bringing together the energy and music of the movement with 90% Dancehall vibes.

name: Contemporary Dance with Andrea Murillo
description: This adult technique class uses somatic approaches, focusing on breath, alignment, and phrase work to build expression.

name: Reggaeton Saturdays @ The DL
description: Keep the weekend energy high with a dedicated Reggaeton night in the heart of the city. Enjoy eclectic music and unforgettable vibes across multiple levels.

name: Rooftop Saturdays
description: Spend your Saturday night on a dynamic rooftop overlooking the city. This event promises a snapshot of the city's rhythm with premium bottle service and diverse music.

name: Bottomless Brunch
description: Enjoy bottomless mimosas and bellinis along with a $30 TOM card to spend at any of the market's food vendors. This weekend tradition offers the perfect way to sample editor-approved concessions.

name: Tarot 101: Learn How to Do Tarot Readings
description: Discover the meanings of all 78 cards in the deck and practice intuitive shuffling techniques to perform your own readings. This class includes a classic Rider-Waite Tarot deck and a bundle of sage.
short_name: Learn How to Do Tarot Readings

name: 2026 Vision Board Crafting & Personal Tarot Readings
description: Set your intentions for the New Year by crafting a vision board while receiving a private tarot reading to clarify your current energy. All basic crafting supplies are provided.
short_name: 2026 Vision Board Crafting & Personal Tarot Readings

name: Writers Group
description: A collaborative space for writers to share their current projects and receive constructive feedback from peers. This group supports various genres and levels of experience.

name: Issues and Action Discussion Circle
description: A weekly gathering to discuss social justice issues and current events from an ethical perspective. Participants explore ways to take meaningful action in their communities.

name: RAAAATSCRAPS: The Best Improv Show in the World
description: NYC’s best improvisers from shows like Succession and Severance join a surprise guest monologist for a night of world-class improv.
short_name: The Best Improv Show in the World

name: Sundays in Italia, Filled Pasta Making!
description: A hands-on Sunday session focused on the art of making filled Italian pasta. Enjoy a relaxed atmosphere with great food, drinks, and the feeling of Italy in the air.
short_name: Sundays in Italia, Filled Pasta Making!

name: Sunday Service
description: Rev. Bridget invites attendees to experience "The Gift of Love" during the liminal space between Christmas and the New Year.

name: Love Feast
description: A community gathering and meal that often centers around fellowship and harm reduction discussions.

name: Community Dinner
description: Volunteers prepare and serve a free meal to anyone who wants one. Free clothing and groceries are also available for guests.

name: Free Form Movement with Sofia Quezaire
description: An all-levels movement class featuring meditation, full-body activation, and improvised movement to foster body-community connection.

name: Fix Your Own Bike Workshop
description: Use provided tools and stands to work on your bike with guidance from experienced mechanics. This open shop workshop is free, though donations are encouraged to support the space.

name: Signature Sundays
description: Shake off the Sunday scaries with live musical performances from local acts on the rooftop. Pair the music with specialty cocktails and brunch for a relaxing all-day affair.

name: Watercolor Exploration
description: Explore watercolor's unique properties through demonstrations of wet-on-wet techniques, layering, and building from light to dark. Students will have time to experiment with landscapes and abstract works.

name: Morning Food Scrap Drop-off
description: Bring fruit, vegetable, and coffee ground scraps to be turned into nutrient-rich compost used throughout the park. Meat, fish, citrus, and compostable cutlery are not accepted.
sublocation: S 3rd St, Between Kent Ave & River St

name: Winter Workshops with A Rosie Day
description: Join A Rosie Day for cozy crafting, skating, and seasonal magic. This free workshop is open to all ages, even for those who do not wish to skate.

name: Excess Anonymous
description: An intimate group dedicated to examining the relationship between our culture of excess and our spiritual lives through deep reflection.

name: Pizzazz with Gary Gulman
description: Veteran comedian Gary Gulman performs his acclaimed stand-up show "Pizzazz."

name: New York City One-Shot: Radegast Hall & Biergarten
description: Join a Dungeons & Dragons 5th Edition one-shot adventure where all materials, including pre-made character sheets, are provided. Players of all experience levels are welcome to learn and play in a social setting.

name: HOT 100 Bingo
description: Score a HOT 100 B-I-N-G-O and win vintage LPs, fabulous prizes, and free booze. This weekly event is 21+ with ID required.

name: Andy Frasco & the U.N.
description: An energetic live performance featuring Andy Frasco & the U.N. with support from Mr. Mota.

name: Cold Process Soap Making for Beginners
description: Learn how to safely make high-quality, lye-based bars of soap in your own kitchen using simple ingredients. This workshop covers lye safety, oil selection, and custom scents.
short_name: Cold Process Soap Making for Beginners

name: The Open Mic Downstairs @ Frigid New York
description: A supportive weekly open mic where performers get seven minutes to try anything from performance art and comedy to music and dance. The event focuses on building an attentive and welcoming community.

name: 222 Tuesdays
description: Visit the historical loft at 222 Bowery to browse artist-curated books, listen to records, and explore the famous Burroughs bedroom. This weekly open house is a space for music and conversation.

name: Bible Study Group
description: A weekly discussion group that examines Old and New Testament scriptures for meaning and relevance in the 21st century.

name: Switch N’ Play Afterparty @ Parklife
description: The official afterparty for the Switch n' Play New Year's Eve Eve show, presented by Parklife After Hours.

name: Parklife After Hours Presents Switch N' Play's New Year's Eve Eve Afterparty
description: Join the official afterparty for Switch n' Play featuring special performances by Divina GranSparkle and Zoe Ziegfeld. DJ Evangeline will provide the beats for this late-night celebration.
short_name: Parklife After Hours Presents Switch N' Play's New Year's Eve Eve Afterparty

name: Friendly Co-working at Brooklyn Meeting
description: Join Friends for co-working with provided chairs, tables, power, tea, coffee, snacks, and wifi.

name: Contact Improvisation Jam
description: A movement jam featuring contact improvisation with live music, beginning with a brief introduction for newcomers.

name: Kompa Tuesdays NYC
description: Join the best Haitian party in Manhattan every Tuesday night. This event celebrates Kompa music with a vibrant dance floor and an energetic crowd.

name: Tuesday Night Jazz with Danny Jonokuchi
description: Enjoy an intimate evening of jazz and wine with Danny Jonokuchi & The Revisionists every other Tuesday night. Hear award-winning swing tunes and dance the night away in the Wine Cave.

name: New York City One-Shot: Brooklyn Brewery
description: Join a Dungeons & Dragons 5th Edition one-shot adventure where all materials, including pre-made character sheets, are provided. Players of all experience levels are welcome to learn and play in a social setting.
short_name: New York City One-Shot: Brooklyn Brewery

name: NYC Public Schools Closed
description: NYC public schools are closed for the winter break. Please refer to the full Department of Education calendar for additional details.

name: Sandra Bernhard: Caught Off Guard
description: Performance artist Sandra Bernhard presents a mix of music and comedy designed to elevate the conversation during treacherous times.

name: BallDrop.com Presents LeGrande Lounge At Time Hotel NYC New Years Eve
description: Ring in the New Year at LeGrande Lounge with BallDrop.com. Enjoy a special New Year's Eve celebration.

name: Nye 2026 Party at Rt60 Rooftop Bar & Lounge at Hard Rock Hotel New York
description: Celebrate New Year's Eve 2026 at the RT60 Rooftop Bar & Lounge in the Hard Rock Hotel New York. Enjoy stunning city views and a festive atmosphere.

name: Bookstore Closing Early for New Year's Eve
short_name: Bookstore Closing Early for New Year's Eve

name: Isaac Oliver’s Very Special Very Early New Year’s Eve
description: Acclaimed writer and humorist Isaac Oliver hosts a "Very Special Very Early New Year's Eve" show with special guests Sara Bareilles and Jonathan Groff. Enjoy stories and performances to ring in the new year in style, and be out by 7:30 PM.
short_name: Isaac Oliver’s Very Special Very Early New Year’s Eve

name: New Year's Eve Celebration
description: Join us to welcome in 2026 with our a la carte menu featuring local foods from around New York, inspiring food specials and a champagne toast at midnight.

name: New Year's Eve with Robyn & Friends
description: Ring in the new year with the Swedish pop icon and a curated lineup of special guests. This event promises a night of dance music and celebration to welcome 2026.

name: Gimme Gimme Disco's New Years Eve (21+)
description: Celebrate New Year's Eve with a high-energy, 70s-inspired disco dance party featuring ABBA and more.
short_name: Gimme Gimme Disco's New Years Eve

name: Abba Lang Syne - New Year's Celebration
description: Celebrate New Year's Eve with a massive ABBA-themed dance party.
short_name: Abba Lang Syne - New Year's Celebration

name: The Rock and Roll Playhouse plays Music of Taylor Swift
description: A "Noon Year's Eve" celebration for kids featuring Isa Bruder & Friends performing the music of Taylor Swift.
short_name: The Rock and Roll Playhouse plays Music of Taylor Swift

name: New Year’s Eve Fireworks in Prospect Park
description: Enjoy a free community fireworks celebration at Grand Army Plaza featuring live music from Quintessential Playlist. The event is hosted in partnership with the Brooklyn Borough President and Prospect Park Alliance.
short_name: New Year’s Eve Fireworks in Prospect Park

name: In Bed by 1:00 - New Year's Eve 2026 at Caveat
description: Celebrate the new year with a four-hour open bar, appetizers, live comedy, music, and a champagne toast, all while being home by 1:00 AM.

name: Drom New Year’s Eve Special
description: Ring in 2026 with a full-course Turkish dinner, live music by Birol Namoğlu, and unlimited drinks.

name: Hey! Douglas — NYE Late Night Party
description: Celebrate New Year’s Eve with a fusion of psychedelic funk and Anatolian rock in this late-night U.S. debut.
short_name: Hey! Douglas — NYE Late Night Party

name: Closed Early for New Year's Eve
description: Greenlight Bookstore will close early on Wednesday, December 31, so that staff may celebrate the New Year's Eve holiday.
short_name: Closed Early for New Year's Eve

name: NYE: Been Catcher
description: Ring in the New Year with a visceral post-punk performance by Catcher and Been Stellar. This sold-out show features a reputation for powerful live performances and a driving low-end sound.

name: 2026 On Company Time NYE BASH
description: Pre-game for the new year with the musical comedy trio On Company Time featuring Kyle Gordon and Sean Millea.

name: Julie Mango – The Season Finale
description: Celebrate six incredible years with the Julie Mango family at this late-night New Year's Eve season finale.

name: New Year's Eve Dance Party with DJ Octopussy
description: Ring in 2026 at a disco-forward house party featuring DJ Octopussy spinning electro-house, pop, soul, and funk. Tickets include free champagne at midnight and hourly margarita shots until the ball drops.

name: Texas Football Watch Party: Cheez-it Citrus Bowl featuring Texas v Michigan
description: Watch the Texas Longhorns take on Michigan in the Cheez-it Citrus Bowl with game day food and drink specials. Enjoy margarita shots for every Texas touchdown.
short_name: Cheez-it Citrus Bowl featuring Texas v Michigan

name: NYE @ Liz's Book Bar
description: Ring in the new year with an open bar featuring beer, wine, and non-alcoholic options, plus a champagne toast at midnight.

name: Patrick Bolden-Smith, Estephanie, Ian Wexx
description: Patrick Bolden-Smith performs live at the Mercury Lounge with supporting acts Estephanie and Ian Wexx.

name: Forever Young : The New Year’s Eve / New Wave Dance Party!
description: This New Year's Eve dance party features the best of New Wave music to ring in 2026.
short_name: The New Year’s Eve / New Wave Dance Party!

name: Resolved: Zohran Inauguration Party (NYC-DSA Fundraiser)
description: Celebrate the inauguration of Zohran Mamdani with this festive NYC-DSA fundraiser. Ring in the new year with socialist comrades and political victory celebrations.

name: Domino Park Trivia
location: Other Half Brewing Company Domino Park
description: Join Other Half Brewing for a trivia night at their Domino Park location. Test your knowledge while enjoying local craft beer in a lively brewery setting.

name: Future Positive New Year's Eve Bike Ride and After Party
description: A celebratory bike ride through the city starting at Washington Square Park and ending with a festive after-party.
short_name: Future Positive New Year's Eve Bike Ride and After Party

name: NYE: Cassy + Scott Grooves + Hidden Spheres + Jenifa Mayanja / Objekt + Introspekt + deep creep / Rich Medina
description: A massive 14-hour New Year's Eve celebration featuring a wide spectrum of house, bass, and soul across multiple rooms.
short_name: Cassy + Scott Grooves + Hidden Spheres + Jenifa Mayanja / Objekt + Introspekt + deep creep / Rich Medina

name: New Years Eve Early Set • Jazz with the Matthew Avedon Trio!
description: Celebrate the end of 2025 with an early evening jazz set by the Matthew Avedon Trio. A sophisticated and festive start to your New Year's Eve celebrations in Williamsburg.
short_name: New Years Eve Early Set • Jazz

name: New Years Eve Late Set • Gypsy Jazz with Diego Campo!
description: Ring in 2026 with a high-energy late-night Gypsy Jazz performance by Diego Campo. This lively set will carry the party through the countdown and into the early hours of the new year.
short_name: New Years Eve Late Set • Gypsy Jazz

name: New Years Eve: East Village
description: Ring in the New Year at this underground celebration featuring five hours of live DJ sets and a midnight champagne toast.

name: New Year's Eve @The DL-NYC
description: Ring in 2026 across three floors of celebration including the premier climate-controlled rooftop. The event features multiple DJs and a festive atmosphere to start the new year.

name: Natalie Cuomo Presents: Classy Trashy New Year's Eve!
description: Kick off your New Year's Eve celebrations early with Natalie Cuomo, Ryan Long, and Emma Willmann.

name: New Year's Eve at The Stand! (6:00 PM)
description: A celebratory New Year's Eve comedy show with an optional prix-fixe dinner package.

name: New Year's Eve at The Stand! (6:30 PM)
description: Rings in the New Year early with a hilarious lineup including Janeane Garofalo and Derek Gaines.

name: New Year's Eve at The Stand! (8:00 PM)
description: Celebrate the final hours of 2025 with Sherrod Small and Vladimir Caamano; prix-fixe dinner available.

name: New Year's Eve at The Stand! (8:30 PM)
description: A prime-time New Year's Eve showcase upstairs featuring Onika McLean and Sherrod Small.

name: New Year's Eve at The Stand! (10:00 PM)
description: The ultimate NYE countdown show in the main room with a star-studded lineup and optional dinner.

name: New Year's Eve at The Stand! (10:30 PM)
description: Ring in the New Year upstairs with Laurie Kilmartin, Jon Rudnitsky, and Onika McLean.

name: Time's UP! Annual Future Positive New Year's Eve Bike Ride
description: Celebrate the new year with an annual festive bike ride or skate through the city. Meet at the Brooklyn-side entrance of the Williamsburg Bridge to join the group.
short_name: Time's UP! Annual Future Positive New Year's Eve Bike Ride

name: Rooftop NYE Celebration
description: Ring in 2026 at Time Out Market New York with live DJs, an open bar, and a sparkling toast. Enjoy incredible views of the city skyline and the Brooklyn and Manhattan Bridges.

name: Best Year Ever!
description: Celebrate New Year's Eve with a massive lineup of comedians featuring Amelia Ritthaler, Blair Dawson, and many more.

name: New Year's Eve Time Machine!
description: Dance through the decades with DJ Cowboy at this high-energy New Year's Eve bash.

name: Sound + Fury Trivia Nights
description: Test your knowledge during this special New Year's Eve edition of trivia night while enjoying local craft beers.

name: NYE Extravaganza with A Vibe Called Blessed and Talib Kweli
description: Ring in 2026 with a high-energy NYE takeover in the lobby featuring music from A Vibe Called Blessed and Talib Kweli.

name: MoCADA New Year’s Eve Birthday Bash 2025
description: Celebrate the arrival of the new year and MoCADA’s birthday at this late-night party.

name: New Years Eve Black Tie Disco Ball
description: Dress up for a black-tie disco ball including access to the HiLot for a sophisticated start to the year.

name: Nye 2026 Party with Two-Hours Open Bar
description: Ring in the new year with a high-energy party featuring a two-hour open bar at one of the city's most iconic venues. Celebrate the arrival of 2026 with great music and a lively crowd.

description: Trivia night at Pete's Candy Store.

description: Ring in the New Year at Pete's Candy Store!

description: LEO LOVECHILD performing at Pete's Candy Store.

description: Celebrate New Year's Eve with a high-energy party at one of the city's most iconic venues. The night features live entertainment and music to ring in 2026.

description: Test your knowledge with Tuff Enuf Trivia hosted by Owen Scott.

description: Enjoy live music featuring Adnata Ensemble with Ofir Ganon in Tiny Montgomery.

description: Enjoy a DJ set by Charlie Davis.

description: Enjoy live music featuring Jonathan Reisin with Jeong Lim Yang "Winding Trio" in Tiny Montgomery.

description: Enjoy live music featuring Sam Kulik's Scarlet Runners with Blump Band in Tiny Montgomery.

description: Grab a complimentary taste of some Threes favorites, from 4-6pm in Moynihan Station!

description: Enjoy live music featuring Bergamot Quartet 'Extended' Residency with Scarcity in Tiny Montgomery.

description: Join our 21+ late-night NYE DISCO PARTY with FREE entry and a complimentary beer toast at midnight!

name: New Year's Eve at Threes Brewing Gowanus
description: Join our 21+ late-night NYE DISCO PARTY with FREE entry and a complimentary beer toast at midnight!

name: Bookstore Closed for New Year's Day
short_name: Bookstore Closed for New Year's Day

name: Brooklyn Nets vs. Houston Rockets
description: Ring in the new year as the Brooklyn Nets take on the Houston Rockets.

name: Evening Food Scrap Drop-off
description: Bring fruit, vegetable, and coffee ground scraps to be turned into nutrient-rich compost used throughout the park. Meat, fish, citrus, and compostable cutlery are not accepted.
sublocation: S 3rd St, Between Kent Ave & River St

name: Celebrating New Year’s Day 2026 with the Tredwells
description: This immersive virtual experience explores the mid-19th century custom of making social calls on New Year’s Day. Viewers will learn how the Tredwell family prepared their home and list of calls to reaffirm friendships for the year ahead.

name: Cadz, Kadesh Flow, dani cruz, DJ Zappa Sound
description: Kick off the New Year with a diverse musical lineup featuring Cadz, Kadesh Flow, dani cruz, and DJ Zappa Sound.
short_name: Cadz, Kadesh Flow, dani cruz, DJ Zappa Sound

name: NYD: Ritual w/ Robert Owens + Ash Lauryn + Colored Craig
description: Kick off the new year with a deep house ritual featuring the iconic voice of Robert Owens.

name: ZOO
description: A docufiction hybrid exploring the serious and surreal story of a Seattle-area zoophile community. This haunting film refuses to compromise style for headline urgency.

name: The Flying Luna Clipper
description: A curated screening at the collective-run microcinema Spectacle in Brooklyn, featuring rare and under-the-radar cult programming.

name: Nye After Party: Bar Crawl
description: Keep the New Year's celebration going with an early morning bar crawl through NYC's hotspots. This high-energy after-party is designed for those who want to dance until sunrise.

name: PSNY Virtual Workshop: Folklore as Form
description: Participants will examine fairy tale motifs as formal structures in contemporary poetics using Kate Bernheimer’s essays as a foundation.
short_name: PSNY Virtual Workshop: Folklore as Form

name: Salsa Thursdays
description: Get your salsa on for free every Thursday with a dance lesson from Marlene Veras followed by a full-on dance party. Music is provided by DJ Ray Suave and a live percussionist.

name: Game Center Playtest Thursdays
description: Bring your work-in-progress games, including digital projects, board games, or VR, to get feedback from fellow game makers. Open to all designers, players, and game enthusiasts.

name: Stranger Things 5: The Finale
description: One last adventure in the final chapter of the hit series.

name: New Year's Hank-O-Rama with The Lonesome Prairie Dogs and Butch Phelps
description: Start the first night of the year with a country-fried celebration featuring The Lonesome Prairie Dogs and Butch Phelps. It is a twangy tradition perfect for shaking off the holiday haze.
This satirical R&B musical comedy tells the story of Barack Obama's presidency as Joe Biden somewhat remembers it.

name: Distillery Tour
description: Learn about the whiskey-making process from milling and mashing to distilling and aging, ending with a tasting of core products in the barrel room.

name: Book a School Tour
description: Hands-on guided tours based on age-appropriate lesson plans for grades K-12, encouraging students to think critically and creatively about food. Offered Thursdays & Fridays.

name: Public Craft Night
description: Bring your current crafting project and work on it with other artists, crafters, and makers of all kinds. Projects range from electronics and costumes to visual arts and woodworking.

name: DE-NOISE w/ Samer Ghadry + Jason Lindner
description: Start the year with a unique musical exploration featuring Samer Ghadry and Jason Lindner. This session focuses on experimental soundscapes and improvisational mastery.

name: New Year's Day ft. Rhonda Rox, Miss Monroe, DJ Daali
description: Keep the celebration going on New Year's Day with a late-night set on the mezzanine. Featured artists include Rhonda Rox, Miss Monroe, and DJ Daali.
short_name: New Year's Day ft. Rhonda Rox, Miss Monroe, DJ Daali

name: A Christmas Carol, Oy! Hannukah, Merry Kwanzaa, Happy Ramadan
description: A multicultural celebration of the holiday season through a unique theatrical performance.
short_name: A Christmas Carol, Oy! Hannukah, Merry Kwanzaa, Happy Ramadan

name: Joe Mande Con Amici
description: Comedian Joe Mande returns with his friends for a night of stand-up comedy.

name: 3OH!3: 15 Years of Streets Of Gold
description: 3OH!3 celebrates 15 years of their album "Streets of Gold" with support from Millionaire$.

name: Levels ‘N’ Stuff [Edm Festival Classics]
description: A night dedicated to EDM festival classics, bangers, and hands-in-the-air anthems.

name: Moonwater, Overtown, Emme Lynn
description: A diverse evening of live music performances featuring Moonwater, Overtown, and Emme Lynn.

name: Seamstress, Gwen, Anything Ever, 2/14
description: Mercury Lounge hosts an indie showcase featuring Seamstress, Gwen, Anything Ever, and 2/14.

name: Composers Concordance Double Feature: Sound Liberation & Sahara von Hattenberger / Joanne Kang Duo
description: A double feature performance featuring compositions by Andrea Casarrubios and Gene Pritsker, blending poetry, trumpet, and piano.
short_name: Sound Liberation & Sahara von Hattenberger / Joanne Kang Duo

name: Weeknights
description: Part of the collective-run microcinema's usual array of unique programming, showcasing the best of underground cinema.

name: Miike Madness Encore Presentation
description: An encore presentation of films by the prolific and boundary-pushing Japanese director Takashi Miike.

name: Fridays Nights @ The DL
description: Join the weekly Friday night tradition at one of Manhattan's top nightlife destinations. Enjoy diverse music sets and a lively crowd across multiple floors.

name: Whiplash
description: The legendary comedy showcase Whiplash returns with a lineup including Jay Jurden and Chloe Radcliffe.

name: So What's Funny Is with Jack Bensinger
description: Jack Bensinger hosts a comedy show exploring the nuances of humor with special guests.

name: Karaoke Tremendous
description: Join the crowd for a night of high-energy karaoke and stage performances.

name: Food Rescue Pickup (Brooklyn Bread - Carroll Gardens)
description: Collect surplus food from Brooklyn Bread in Carroll Gardens and deliver it to CHiPS by foot, bike, or car. Your participation supports the fight against hunger in Brooklyn.

name: Food Rescue Pickup (Brooklyn Bread - Park Slope)
description: Pick up donations from Brooklyn Bread’s Park Slope location and deliver them to CHiPS. Volunteers can use a car, bike, or cart to transport the rescued items.

name: Food Rescue Pickup (Simple Loaf - Park Slope)
description: Transport surplus food from Simple Loaf in Park Slope to the CHiPS community pantry. Volunteers help ensure that high-quality food reaches those in need rather than going to waste.

name: Frozen
description: A Disney animated classic where the power of family is the strongest magic of all.

name: Lower East Stories, hosted by Matt Storrs
description: This monthly storytelling salon brings together creatives and experts to share stories based on rotating themes. This month's theme is "New Beginning."
short_name: Lower East Stories, hosted by Matt Storrs

name: Arrow the Symbol
description: Experience a live performance by Arrow the Symbol at this intimate Clinton Hill music venue. The venue features a fully loaded sound and video stage.

name: Whiskey Tasting Class
description: Guided whiskey tasting class where participants learn how to nose and taste whiskey like a pro while sampling a flight of five premium hand-crafted whiskeys.

name: Museum Highlights Tour
description: Join an informative and engaging tour of the subway station home that explores exhibits, objects, and vintage train cars. Participants will hear behind-the-scenes stories about New York’s transit history.

name: Masks On Craft Night
description: Enjoy the collaborative atmosphere of a regular craft night within a masks-required environment for added safety. Participants are encouraged to bring any project they are currently working on.

name: Martian Tickets Presents: Internet Wav Open Mic
description: Martian Tickets hosts an open mic night focused on the "Internet Wav" aesthetic. It is a great opportunity to see emerging talent across various genres.

name: The Story of Sal B and Barbranne: A Mob Fantasia (Cyrano Redux)
description: A mob-themed fantasia that reimagines the classic story of Cyrano de Bergerac through a gritty new lens.

name: Beauty Bites
description: A short-run theatrical production exploring themes of beauty and its consequences in modern society.

name: 19th Annual 50 First Jokes
description: A beloved annual tradition where 50 comedians tell their first new joke of the year.

name: Atomic Funk Project
description: "Hot Funk in the Wintertime" features AFP performing the music of Sly, Prince, and Stevie Wonder.

name: Pressed Flower Coasters
description: Create tiny tabletop masterpieces by framing already-pressed flowers between two sheets of acrylic. Students can make up to four coasters, making them perfect for personalized gifts.

name: Evento's Pasta Making Dance Party!
description: Master regional Italian pasta making in a high-energy setting with an open wine bar and a live DJ. Guests can choose to take their handmade pasta home or donate it to a local organization.

name: K-Pop Revolution [Early Edition]
description: An early edition dance party featuring DJs Doom Kitty & Katastrophiee playing the best in K-Pop.

name: Lust for Life: Lana Del Rey Dance Party
description: A dance party dedicated to the music of Lana Del Rey, featuring remixes and classic tracks.
short_name: Lust for Life: Lana Del Rey Dance Party

name: Out-FRONT! Festival
description: A radical queer art and dance festival championing LGBTQ+ and feminist artists for a lively exchange of culture.

name: Peoples’ Voice Cafe
description: An alternative coffeehouse presenting folk, blues, and spoken word while shining a spotlight on social issues.

name: Lucas Maehara Rotman
description: Brooklyn-based singer-songwriter Lucas Maehara Rotman performs lyric-driven Mosaic Americana with an arc that bends towards social justice.

name: DSA Running Club - Queens Run2Canvass- Diana for AD36
description: Combine fitness and electoral organizing by running to canvass for Diana in AD36. Help spread the word about socialist candidates while hitting the pavement with the running club.
short_name: DSA Running Club - Queens Run2Canvass- Diana for AD36

name: Nyc-Dsa 101
description: New to NYC-DSA or maybe just socialist-curious? Learn about the organization's structure, goals, and how you can get involved in local struggles.

name: New York University Wrestling vs Johns Hopkins University
description: NYU wrestlers face off against Johns Hopkins in an early season dual meet.
short_name: New York University Wrestling vs Johns Hopkins University

name: New York University Wrestling vs Gettysburg College
description: The Violets host Gettysburg College for an afternoon of collegiate wrestling matches.
short_name: New York University Wrestling vs Gettysburg College

name: New York University Wrestling vs Centenary University
description: NYU concludes its wrestling triple-header against Centenary University of New Jersey.
short_name: New York University Wrestling vs Centenary University

name: Delroy Edwards + JADALAREIGN / Heidi Lawden + Tim Sweeney / Justin Strauss
description: A showcase of house and experimental club sounds featuring L.A. Connection and NYC mainstays.
short_name: Delroy Edwards + JADALAREIGN / Heidi Lawden + Tim Sweeney / Justin Strauss

name: Wake Up & Dance with Suzi Shelton
description: Award-winning children's musician Suzi Shelton leads a joyful concert series for young dancers and their families.

name: Two-man opera: Franz Schubert's Winterreise
description: Darren Chase performs his own English translation of Schubert’s classic song cycle, accompanied by pianist Michael Scales.

name: Cathedral of New Emotions
description: A unique cinematic experience at the Spectacle microcinema in Brooklyn, part of their curated film series.

name: Passport to Destiny (on 16Mm)
description: A special screening presented on 16mm film at Spectacle, showcasing the tactile quality of vintage analog formats.

name: The Best of Me
description: Part of the Best of Spectacle 2025 series, highlighting top underground and rare films screened at the microcinema.

name: Despiser
description: A late-night cult screening at Brooklyn's collective-run microcinema, exploring the fringes of independent cinema.

name: Kyle Lewis Presents: Character Select
description: A unique character-driven comedy show hosted by Kyle Lewis featuring various comedic personas.

name: Spotlight Saturdays: Noise Complaint
description: DJ LSJ presents a late-night party featuring hip-hop, RnB, Afro beats, and Latin mixes. Enjoy drink specials from Cazadores Tequila and jello shots on the rooftop.

name: Zach Schiffman: Flight Risk
description: Zach Schiffman performs his solo comedy show "Flight Risk" featuring Jessie Lee.

name: Body Count hosted by Tessa Belle and Jo Sunday
description: A comedy show hosted by the hilarious duo of Tessa Belle and Jo Sunday.
short_name: Body Count hosted by Tessa Belle and Jo Sunday

name: Young Adult Friction: an indie + alt dance party
description: A dance party dedicated to indie and alternative hits both old and new.

name: Hook
description: Steven Spielberg's imaginative take on what might happen if Peter Pan grew up.

name: Face/Off
description: An FBI agent assumes his criminal rival's identity in this John Woo action masterpiece.

name: McGolrick Bird Club
description: Participate in a weekly year-round birding walk through McGolrick Park. Meet at the Russell and Driggs entrance to spot local avian residents.

name: Fireside Meditation
description: Gather around the fire at Fort Greene Park to check in with your body, heart and mind while sipping tea and reflecting.

name: Sharkswimmer
description: Sharkswimmer performs live with support from Haybaby and Debbie Dopamine. This is a 21+ event.

name: Honest Mistakes • Summerclub • Ruby Deena
description: Experience a night of emerging talent with a triple-bill showcase of local alternative and indie acts. This evening features performances by Honest Mistakes, Summerclub, and Ruby Deena.

name: Self. Perpetual / Kouka Man / Fxlse47
description: A diverse musical showcase featuring performances by Self. Perpetual, KOUKA MAN, and FXLSE47. Enjoy top-rated drinks and food while watching local and global artists.

name: Shabbat Shacharit Services
location: Kehila Kedosha Janina Synagogue And Museum
description: Weekly morning prayer services practicing traditional Romaniote customs and liturgy, including unique piyutim exclusive to the Romaniote rite. Everyone is welcome to join this historic Lower East Side congregation.

name: Three Kings Day / Los Tres Reyes Celebration
description: A festive cultural celebration featuring performances and community gathering to honor the traditional holiday.
short_name: Three Kings Day / Los Tres Reyes Celebration

name: Israel Yanir / Nyxjvh / Mangodog
description: A triple-bill showcase featuring Israel Yanir, NYXJVH, and MANGODOG. Experience a night of diverse sounds and energetic live performances in the showroom.

name: Brooklyn Nets vs. Denver Nuggets Kids Day
description: The Brooklyn Nets take on the Denver Nuggets for a special Kids Day event. Enjoy special pricing on concession stand favorites.
short_name: Brooklyn Nets vs. Denver Nuggets Kids Day

name: DCBday – Celebrating the Music of David Berman
description: A special tribute night honoring the musical legacy of the late David Berman of Silver Jews and Purple Mountains.
short_name: DCBday – Celebrating the Music of David Berman

name: Needle Felted Pineapples and Plants
description: Use needle felting techniques to sculpt three-dimensional pineapples, cacti, or other tropical plants. Your finished creation will be placed in a mini flower pot to serve as a decoration or pincushion.

name: Collage Affirmations
description: Unleash your creativity using magazines and vintage ephemera to create a unique collage featuring a chosen affirmation. This workshop blends artistic expression with self-care and goal manifestation.

name: The Power of In-Person Interaction
description: This session explores the sociological and ethical importance of physical social connection in an increasingly digital world. Join the discussion on how face-to-face interactions build stronger communities.

name: Brooklyn Music Lab: Winterfest Day 3
description: An all-ages emerging artists showcase curated by Jack McShane featuring Pop, Rock, R&B, Soul, and Jazz.

name: Brooklyn Music Lab: Emerging Artists Showcase
description: The evening installment of the Brooklyn Music Lab showcase featuring rising talents in various genres.

name: Falling Out - A New Musical (Preview)
description: A world premiere musical by Josee Klein following the intersection of a melancholic transplant and a musician in a downtown bar. The story explores heartbreak and redemption through original songwriting and discordant harmony.

name: Bellcave, Jemi, Big Blind
description: An evening of rock and alternative music featuring Bellcave, Jemi, and Big Blind.

name: Guided House Tour: Healthcare in Tredwell Times
description: This afternoon tour examines the diseases and medical treatments common in 19th-century New York, including outbreaks of cholera and typhoid. The program also covers medical care within the Tredwell family and advancements spurred by the Civil War.

name: Self-Defense & Awareness
description: Participate in a self-defense and situational awareness workshop designed specifically for organizers. Build confidence and safety skills within a supportive community setting.

name: The Fat Cats Youth Orchestra Open Workshop and Rehearsals
description: Weekly open workshops and rehearsals for the Fat Cats Youth Orchestra, focusing on mentorship and musical excellence.
short_name: The Fat Cats Youth Orchestra Open Workshop and Rehearsals

name: Children of the Stones
description: A curated screening of the cult classic television series at Spectacle microcinema.

name: The Duchess
description: A comedy showcase featuring Charlie Flynn, Richie Raymond, and a variety of funny guests.

name: Used To Be Young (Miley x Adele)
description: A musical performance blending the iconic sounds of Miley Cyrus and Adele in a historic setting.

name: Gotham Writers Workshop: Humor Writing
description: Gotham President Alexander Steele teaches the hallmarks of humorous prose and comedic techniques to turn sentences into smiles.

name: Femmes Book Club
description: A book club for femme-presenting readers discussing "BITTER SWEET" by Hattie Williams and other contemporary fiction featuring badass characters.

name: InspiredWordNYC Presents – 1st and 3rd Sundays Open Mic
description: A long-running open mic series welcoming musicians, poets, and comedians to the stage. This event provides a platform for local talent in a supportive, high-energy environment.
short_name: InspiredWordNYC Presents – 1st and 3rd Sundays Open Mic

name: ‘Spaghetti & Marshmallows’ – Rev. Micah C. Ma Preaching
description: Rev. Micah C. Ma will be preaching. The service is titled ‘Spaghetti & Marshmallows’.
short_name: ‘Spaghetti & Marshmallows’ – Rev. Micah C. Ma Preaching

name: Intro to TouchDesigner
description: Learn the underlying logic and workflows of TouchDesigner to start creating interactive and immersive generative media. This beginner-friendly class covers node-based programming and the six operator families.

name: Brooklyn Navy Yard: World War II Tour
description: Explore the history of the Navy Yard during its peak production years in World War II. This walking tour visits historical sites and shares stories of the sailors and workers who served there.
short_name: Brooklyn Navy Yard: World War II Tour

name: CQL Book Group: Spiritual Transformation
description: The new Concern for Quaker Living Book Club theme is Spiritual Transformation. All are welcome to join this community discussion of spiritual texts. This meeting focuses on a discussion of "Prayer: Beginning Again."

name: WWE Monday Night RAW
description: WWE Monday Night RAW returns to Brooklyn featuring World Heavyweight Champion CM Punk vs. Bron Breaker.

name: Cyanotype After Dark
description: Experiment with blueprinting by using grow lights to create beautiful blue-hued photograms on pre-sensitized paper. This hands-on session focuses on creating images from nature and household objects.

name: Short(er) Slavic Novels Book Club with Arya
description: This meeting focuses on Ivan Klima's "Love and Garbage," a novel set in Prague that explores love and conscience under totalitarianism. This book club focuses on Slavic literature under 300 pages.

name: NOTNORTH, Believe in Ghost!, MONTE, Magdala
description: Catch a live performance by NOTNORTH along with Believe in Ghost!, MONTE, and Magdala.
short_name: NOTNORTH, Believe in Ghost!, MONTE, Magdala

name: New York University Women’s Basketball vs Skidmore College
description: The NYU women's team takes the court for a matchup against Skidmore College.
short_name: New York University Women’s Basketball vs Skidmore College

name: First Mondays: Readings of New Works In Progress
description: Organized by Sarah Schulman, this monthly program features writers from various generations previewing new works-in-progress devoid of censorship.
short_name: Readings of New Works In Progress

name: Monsters
description: An anthology of televised spooks created by Richard P. Rubenstein, featuring goopy makeup effects and talent from post-no wave New York directors.

name: Illuminated Interpretations
description: Conceptual artist Hannah Robinett presents a series of artworks inspired by the Book of Hours. The exhibition explores phrases, spirituality, and beauty through various media.

name: Frankenstein's Baby
description: A comedy variety show featuring Jeff Hiller, Maddy Kelly, and Nat Towsen.

name: New York City One-Shot: Wild East Brewing
description: Join a Dungeons & Dragons 5th Edition one-shot adventure where all materials, including pre-made character sheets, are provided. Players of all experience levels are welcome to learn and play in a social setting.

name: Bodyweight Interval Training
description: Bodyweight Interval Training is an energetic yet low impact exercise class that will get your muscles moving.

name: CB6 Committee Meeting – Business & Licenses Committee
description: A committee meeting of Brooklyn Community Board 6 to discuss business and licensing issues. The agenda for this meeting is to be determined.
sublocation: Cobble Hill Community Room/ Carroll Gardens Pop-Up Library
short_name: CB6 Committee Meeting – Business & Licenses Committee

name: Murder, They Read Book Club
description: Join fellow readers to dissect murder mysteries and thrillers, currently discussing "THE ONCE AND FUTURE ME" by Melissa Pace.

name: InspiredWordNYC Presents – Monday Open Mic
description: A weekly open mic event featuring a mix of music, poetry, and comedy. Performers can showcase their work on a professional stage with high-quality sound.

name: Nuyorican Bowery Slam
description: A competitive poetry slam where local artists perform original spoken word pieces to be judged by the audience.

name: Quiet Reading Brooklyn
description: Join for an evening of quiet reading followed by socializing. Attendees are encouraged to bring their own books and make new connections, with admission requiring one purchase from the bar.

name: Making & Mending Night
description: Mending & Making Night — 1st and 3rd Tuesdays, 6-8 pm, at Brooklyn Meeting. Create community, mend clothing, make items by hand, craft for a better tomorrow! This is a creative and communal gathering focused on sustainability and crafting.

name: Nora Neus presents 24 Hours at the Capitol
description: Journalist Nora Neus discusses her book on the January 6 riots with Timothy J. Heaphy, featuring never-before-heard accounts.

name: Orientation
description: The first step for anyone interested in BRIC's media classes and community resources.

name: Mobile Phone Photography
description: Discover tips and wallet-friendly apps to take beautiful, compelling images with your mobile phone.

name: Improv for Communication Skills
description: Use improvisational exercises to build professional communication skills like active listening, presenting, and thinking on your feet. No prior comedy or acting experience is required for this workshop.

name: Three Kings Day
description: Celebrate Three Kings Day with a community toy drive featuring giveaways for children of all ages. The event includes festive bites from market vendors and interactive activity stations for kids.

name: Jungle Cat Comedy
description: Abby Govindan and Ibhan Kulkarni host a monthly comedy showcase featuring a lineup of talented comedians.

name: Literary Black Book Club with Genay
description: The group will discuss "The Wilderness" by Angela Flournoy, which follows five Black women through twenty years of friendship. This club focuses on contemporary fiction primarily written by Black women.

name: composition and critique
description: Led by Nandini Chirimar, this discussion-based class focuses on composition principles and critique of both in-progress and completed artwork. Participants will explore how to achieve balance and create cohesive series across various media.

name: Schmoedipus
description: A curated screening at Spectacle, showcasing under-the-radar and unique independent programming in Brooklyn.

name: Kill the Moonlight
description: An underground cult classic screening at the Spectacle microcinema collective in Williamsburg.

name: 90’s Simpsons Trivia
description: Test your knowledge of the Golden Years of The Simpsons at this free monthly trivia event. The evening features prizes, classic episodes, and themed questions.

name: Simpsons Trivia Night
description: Test your deep knowledge of The Simpsons and compete for prizes with other fans.

name: PSNY BIPOC Free Verse Workshop: The Poetry of Selves
description: This free generative workshop centers voices and themes relevant to BIPOC poets, exploring displacement and immigration. Led by Annika Karody, the session uses poets like Joy Harjo as guideposts for celebrating humanity.

name: Arctic Reverie
description: Artist Leslie Sobel presents paintings documenting the beauty and fragility of the High Arctic based on residencies in Svalbard. The works aim to capture the sacred nature of landscapes transforming due to climate change.

name: Infamous Ray
description: Infamous Ray Devito brings along Mark Normand and Todd Barry for a night of incredible stand-up.

name: Chris Duffy HUMOR ME book release
description: Chris Duffy celebrates his book release with a star-studded comedy lineup including Jo Firestone and Josh Sharp.
short_name: Chris Duffy HUMOR ME book release

name: Mary Beth Does an Hour
description: Comedian Mary Beth Barone performs a full hour of her signature stand-up comedy.

name: 100 Meters
description: A gifted runner's dominance is challenged by a new student in this high-stakes track story.

name: NYRR Open Run: Brooklyn Bridge Park
description: Free, weekly community-led 5K runs open to all ages and experience levels.
short_name: NYRR Open Run: Brooklyn Bridge Park

name: Sarah Adams: In Your Dreams w/ Cara Bastone & Lauren Kung Jessen
description: Author Sarah Adams discusses her new romance novel about a culinary professional returning to her Kentucky hometown. She is joined by authors Cara Bastone and Lauren Kung Jessen.

name: Romance Book Club
description: A monthly meeting for romance enthusiasts to discuss swoon-worthy stories, featuring "VIOLET THISTLEWAITE IS NOT A VILLAIN ANYMORE" by Emily Krempholtz.

name: Tastes of Chinatown: Neighborhood History and Food Tour
description: Savor five different culinary delights while learning about 150 years of history in one of the city's most famous neighborhoods. The tour explores landmarks and cultural heritage with stops for noodles, dumplings, and dessert.

name: Breaking Sound Presents: Thammarat / lialekha / CO.RREIA / Arusha / Eric Who
description: Breaking Sound showcases the hottest emerging artists in a live concert setting. The lineup includes Thammarat, lialekha, CO.RREIA, Arusha, and Eric Who.
short_name: Thammarat / lialekha / CO.RREIA / Arusha / Eric Who

name: Lectures on Tap - "World's Rarest Traditions: Sacred Silk, Magic Mirrors"
description: Discover unique and sacred global traditions involving everything from ancient magic mirrors to the production of sacred silk.

name: A-Sides Presents: Izzy Raye / Psychtooth (Solo Set) / Danny Abrams
description: A-Sides presents an evening of intimate performances including a solo set from Psychtooth. The lineup features Izzy Raye and Danny Abrams for a night of singer-songwriter talent.
